content:
# Spectral Reflectance

**Summary**: The proportion of incident radiation reflected by a surface at specific wavelengths.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022]] studied the spectral reflectance of 21 common materials to create a library for waste identification.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022]] Used to distinguish between various types of waste materials in satellite imagery.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022]] measured using a spectroradiometer.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- A spectral library was established for 21 different materials found in dumpsites. ([[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022, p. 11]])
